field.name: worksheet_properties
field.eval:
{ '7d37c31a412cf220': (datetime.now()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '7d37c31a412cf221': (datetime.now()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '4e67e5166cfca465': '89b565d13c43c300', '7d37c31a412cf220_html': '

Certified

', '7d37c31a412cf223': ref('res_partner_11'), '7d37c31a412cf224': ref('res_partner_10'), '7d37c31a412cf225': 'Distribution network operator', '7d37c31a412cf226': 'EnerGrid Networks', '7d37c31a412cf227': 12345678, '7d37c31a412cf228': 'TT', '7d37c31a412cf229': 'Loop', '7d37c31a412cf22a': '3X400 + N', '7d37c31a412cf22b': 63, '7d37c31a412cf22c': '123456789123456789', '7d37c31a412cf221_html': '


', '7d37c31a412cf22d': (datetime.now()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '7d37c31a412cf22e': ref('res_partner_11'), '7d37c31a412cf22f': '123456789123456789', '7d37c31a412cf22g': '30mA', '7d37c31a412cf22h': 'Type A', '7d37c31a412cf22i': 40, '7d37c31a412cf22j': False, '7d37c31a412cf22k': 123456, '7d37c31a412cf22l': 5, '7d37c31a412cf22m': 12, '7d37c31a412cf22n': True, '7d37c31a412cf22o': True, '7d37c31a412cf22p': True, '7d37c31a412cf22q': True, '7d37c31a412cf22r': True, '7d37c31a412cf22s': True, '7d37c31a412cf22t': True, '7d37c31a412cf22u': True, '7d37c31a412cf222_html': '

The electrical installation complies with the requirements of the law concerning low voltage and very low voltage electrical installations.

', 'df81b419282b4e86': False }

field.name: worksheet_properties
field.eval:
{ '7d37c31a412cf220': (datetime.now()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '7d37c31a412cf221': (datetime.now()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '4e67e5166cfca465': '89b565d13c43c300', '7d37c31a412cf220_html': '

Certified

', '7d37c31a412cf223': False, '7d37c31a412cf224': ref('res_partner_10'), '7d37c31a412cf225': 'Distribution network operator', '7d37c31a412cf226': 'EnerGrid Networks', '7d37c31a412cf227': 87456321, '7d37c31a412cf228': 'TT', '7d37c31a412cf229': 'Loop', '7d37c31a412cf22a': '3X400 + N', '7d37c31a412cf22b': 63, '7d37c31a412cf22c': '123456789123456789', '7d37c31a412cf22d': (datetime.now()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d'), '7d37c31a412cf22e': ref('res_partner_11'), '7d37c31a412cf22f': '123456789123456789', '7d37c31a412cf22g': '30mA', '7d37c31a412cf22h': 'Type A', '7d37c31a412cf22i': 40, '7d37c31a412cf22k': 123456, '7d37c31a412cf22l': 5, '7d37c31a412cf22m': 12, '7d37c31a412cf22n': True, '7d37c31a412cf22o': True, '7d37c31a412cf22p': True, '7d37c31a412cf22q': True, '7d37c31a412cf22r': True, '7d37c31a412cf22s': True, '7d37c31a412cf22t': True, '7d37c31a412cf22u': True, '7d37c31a412cf222_html': '

The electrical installation complies with the requirements of the law concerning low voltage and very low voltage electrical installations. The next inspection visit must be carried out no later than within 25 years.

If applicable, appropriate measures have been taken by YourCompany to seal the input terminals of the residual current device located at the origin of the electrical installation and the single-line diagrams and position plans have been reviewed again by YourCompany.

', 'df81b419282b4e86': False }
